iran_nuke.notes: Oman breakthrough (Feb 27): Iran agreed to never stockpile enriched uranium and full IAEA verification. No weapons-grade enrichment signals. Nuclear track de-escalated.

iran_conventional.notes: Strait of Hormuz effectively closed — Iran laying mines, IRGC threatens 'not one litre of oil' exported. Oil past $100/bbl and spiraling. Iranian frigate IRIS Dena sunk by USS Charlotte in Indian Ocean. Day 13 of war, cost $11.3B to US. Merchant ships struck in Hormuz. No diplomatic engagement visible. Hezbollah attacks on Gulf states reported.

israel_lebanon.notes: IDF ground operations in Lebanon. 800,000+ displaced, 680+ killed. Israel strikes center of Beirut — killed Hamas official in Beirut strike. 210+ Hezbollah rockets fired since March 2. Sweeping displacement order for southern Lebanon (25 miles from border).

turkey.notes: Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (2 incidents). NATO Article 4 discussions with allies. Erdogan warns Iran against 'wrong and provocative steps' but insists Turkey is 'on side of peace.' Avoiding direct US confrontation. No Article 5 or mobilization signals.

india.notes: Previous 'missile_reported' signal downgraded — involved Pakistan-Afghanistan conflict, not India-Pakistan. No India-Pakistan border buildup, no nuclear rhetoric. Conflict is Pakistan vs Afghanistan/Taliban with Indian diplomatic support for Afghan sovereignty.

russia.notes: Russia continues arms supply relationship with Iran. UN Security Council rejected Russian draft resolution on Iran conflict. Russia blames UK/NATO intelligence for Ukraine strikes. No direct Russia involvement in ME conflict. Russia occupies ~20% of Ukraine.

china.notes: PLA flights resume in Taiwan ADIZ after brief pause. US Navy conducted Taiwan Strait patrol ahead of Trump-Xi summit (Mar 31-Apr 2). Naval activity around Taiwan continues. No major military exercises or confrontation. Diplomatic track active via planned summit.

north_korea.notes: Cruise missile test from Choe Hyon destroyer (Mar 10) — Kim Jong Un emphasized 'powerful nuclear war deterrent.' Kim visiting munitions factories, testing pistols with daughter. Conventional modernization focus. No ICBM or nuclear test.

top_signals: Iran laying mines in Strait of Hormuz — effective closure to shipping
IRGC threatens zero oil exports from Middle East if attacks continue
Iranian frigate IRIS Dena sunk by USS Charlotte in Indian Ocean
Israel ground invasion of Lebanon — 800,000 displaced, 680+ killed
Israel strikes central Beirut, kills Hamas official
Oil past $100/bbl with continued upward pressure
Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (2x)
US military plane crashes in Iraq (conflict-related)

new: hormuz_closed — Iran actively mining strait, IRGC enforces closure
iran_sunk_ship — IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine
israel_ground_invasion_lebanon — confirmed IDF ground operations in Lebanon
israeli_casualties_high — significant casualties on both sides
beirut_bombing — center of Beirut struck, Hamas official killed
removed: missile_reported — reclassified: Pakistan-Afghanistan conflict, not India-Pakistan

latest_news.headline: Iran laying mines in Strait of Hormuz — US officials confirm
IRGC declares 'not one litre of oil' will be exported from Middle East
Iranian frigate IRIS Dena sunk by USS Charlotte in Indian Ocean
Israel strikes central Beirut — kills Hamas official, orders south Lebanon evacuation
800,000 displaced in Lebanon as IDF ground operations continue — 680+ killed
Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace — Erdogan warns Iran
Oil past $100/bbl — US orders strategic petroleum reserve release
North Korea tests cruise missiles from destroyer — Kim emphasizes nuclear deterrent

outlook: Iran conventional war is the dominant escalation vector — now at IMMINENT (50%) with Hormuz closure and active naval combat. Israel-Lebanon front expanding rapidly with ground invasion confirmed. Turkey is a wild card with Iranian missiles overflying its airspace. No nuclear escalation signals on any track. Watch for: oil prices crossing $120/bbl, Hezbollah 100+ rocket barrage, Turkey Article 4 invocation, US ground troop casualties.
